questions.question_text: Which AWS service can be used to run code without provisioning or managing servers, and automatically scales based on incoming requests?

A company wants to migrate its on-premises application to AWS. The application has unpredictable traffic patterns and the company wants to minimize costs. Which EC2 purchasing option is most suitable?
Which AWS service provides a fully managed NoSQL database with single-digit millisecond latency at any scale?
Which of the following are benefits of using Amazon CloudFront? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Reduces latency by caching content at edge locations
Provides DDoS protection through AWS Shield
Replicates data across multiple AWS Regions automatically
Encrypts data at rest using AWS KMS
Replaces the need for an origin server
correct_answers: Reduces latency by caching content at edge locations
Provides DDoS protection through AWS Shield

questions.question_text: Which AWS service allows you to track API calls made in your AWS account for auditing and security analysis?
A company needs to ensure that its EC2 instances are protected from unauthorized access at the instance level. Which AWS feature should they configure?
Which of the following are characteristics of the AWS Basic Support plan? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: 24x7 access to customer service and documentation
Access to the AWS Support API
One-hour response time for production system down
Access to all AWS Trusted Advisor checks
Limited access to core Trusted Advisor checks
correct_answers: 24x7 access to customer service and documentation
Limited access to core Trusted Advisor checks

questions.question_text: Which AWS service is used to decouple application components by providing a message queue that can store messages until they are processed?
A company wants to automate the creation of its AWS infrastructure, including EC2 instances, VPCs, and RDS databases, using code. Which AWS service should it use?
Which of the following factors should be considered when selecting an AWS Region for a new workload? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Proximity to end users for low latency
The number of edge locations in the Region
The size of the Region's local data center
correct_answers: Proximity to end users for low latency

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a scalable, durable, and low-cost object storage for backup and archival?
Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which of the following is the customer's responsibility?
possible_answers: Securing the guest operating system on EC2
correct_answers: Securing the guest operating system on EC2

questions.question_text: Which AWS service can be used to analyze cost and usage data and forecast future AWS spending?
A company wants to run a batch processing job that can be interrupted and resumed. Which EC2 purchasing option offers the largest discount but may reclaim capacity with two-minute notice?
Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)
Which AWS service allows you to create a virtual private network (VPN) connection to your on-premises data center?

A company needs to store customer data in a bucket with high durability and availability, and the data is accessed infrequently but must be available within milliseconds. Which S3 storage class is most cost-effective?
Which of the following can be used to provide temporary, limited-privilege credentials to an AWS service or user?
Which AWS service is used to monitor the health and performance of your AWS resources and applications in real time?
A company wants to ensure that its EC2 instances are automatically added or removed based on demand. Which AWS service should it configure?
Which AWS support plan provides a Technical Account Manager (TAM) and the fastest response times for critical issues?
Which of the following services are global in scope (not tied to a specific AWS Region)? (Select TWO.)
Which AWS service provides a fully managed, petabyte-scale data warehouse for business intelligence and analytics?

A company wants to give its developers secure access to AWS resources without creating IAM users for each developer. They want to federate with their existing corporate directory. Which AWS service should they use?
Which of the following statements about Availability Zones are true? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Each Availability Zone is isolated from others to prevent failure spread
Availability Zones are connected by low-latency links
A single Availability Zone can span multiple AWS Regions
Data transfer between Availability Zones is free
An Availability Zone is a collection of edge locations
correct_answers: Each Availability Zone is isolated from others to prevent failure spread
Availability Zones are connected by low-latency links

questions.question_text: Which AWS service is used to continuously deliver software changes automatically using pipelines?
A company has a steady-state workload that will run for 3 years. Which purchasing option provides the highest discount?
Which AWS service can help you automatically recover EC2 instances if they become impaired due to a hardware failure?
Which of the following are responsibilities of AWS under the Shared Responsibility Model? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Patching the guest operating system on EC2

questions.question_text: Which AWS service can be used to create a scalable and highly available DNS service that routes end users to applications?
A company wants to set spending limits and receive alerts when their AWS costs exceed a threshold. Which tool should they use?
Which of the following is an AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF) perspective that focuses on ensuring cloud investments accelerate business outcomes?
Which AWS service allows you to store Docker images and run containers in a managed environment?
A company is concerned about the risk of accidentally deleting objects in an S3 bucket. Which feature should they enable to preserve previous versions of objects?
Which of the following are true about Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: You pay for compute capacity by the hour or second with no long-term commitment
They are the cheapest EC2 pricing option
They are ideal for workloads with unpredictable usage patterns
You must reserve capacity for at least one year
They are best for batch processing jobs that can be interrupted
correct_answers: You pay for compute capacity by the hour or second with no long-term commitment
They are ideal for workloads with unpredictable usage patterns

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, serverless data integration service that makes it easy to discover, prepare, and combine data for analytics and machine learning?
A company needs to establish a dedicated, private network connection from its on-premises data center to AWS. Which service should it use?
Which of the following AWS services can be used to deploy a web application with automated scaling and load balancing without managing the underlying infrastructure?
Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which of the following is the customer's sole responsibility for an RDS database?
possible_answers: Managing the underlying host operating system

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a managed, scalable file storage for use with EC2 instances that can be accessed by multiple instances simultaneously?
A company wants to receive real-time notifications when a new object is uploaded to an S3 bucket. Which service can be used to trigger a Lambda function?
Which of the following are benefits of using AWS Organizations? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Free data transfer between all accounts

questions.question_text: Which AWS service can be used to add user sign-up, sign-in, and access control to web and mobile applications?

A company wants to deploy a critical application across multiple data centers to ensure high availability. Which AWS Global Infrastructure component provides physically separate locations within a Region?
Which AWS service is a web application firewall that helps protect web applications from common web exploits?
Which of the following describe the concept of elasticity in AWS? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: The ability to automatically scale resources up or down based on demand
Paying only for what you use
The ability to recover from failures quickly
Running applications on multiple Availability Zones
Replacing upfront capital expense with variable expense
correct_answers: The ability to automatically scale resources up or down based on demand
Paying only for what you use

questions.question_text: Which AWS service can be used to analyze and visualize data, create dashboards, and perform ad-hoc queries on data stored in S3?
A company wants to migrate a large amount of on-premises data to AWS using a physical device. Which service should they use?
Which of the following is true about AWS Regions?
possible_answers: Each Region consists of multiple Availability Zones
A Region is a single data center
Regions are connected by the public internet
All AWS services are available in every Region
correct_answers: Each Region consists of multiple Availability Zones

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a low-cost, durable storage solution for data that is accessed infrequently and requires retrieval in minutes?
A company needs to ensure that its EC2 instances are distributed across multiple isolated locations to prevent a single point of failure. Which best practice should they follow?
possible_answers: Use multiple Availability Zones within a Region
correct_answers: Use multiple Availability Zones within a Region

questions.question_text: Which AWS service is a fully managed search and analytics engine used for log analytics, real-time application monitoring, and clickstream analysis?
Which of the following are advantages of cloud computing over on-premises infrastructure? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Trade capital expense for variable expense
Fixed monthly costs regardless of usage
correct_answers: Trade capital expense for variable expense

questions.question_text: Which AWS service can be used to automate the patching of EC2 instances and ensure compliance with security standards?
A company wants to send transactional emails to its customers at scale. Which AWS service is best suited for this?
Which of the following is a responsibility of AWS in the Shared Responsibility Model for EC2?
Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly available, and scalable relational database that supports PostgreSQL and MySQL compatibility?
A company wants to run short-lived, event-driven functions without managing servers. Which AWS service should they use?
Which of the following are valid EC2 instance pricing models? (Select THREE.)
Which AWS service provides a scalable, in-memory cache for applications to improve database performance?
A company wants to provide its employees with fully managed virtual desktops in the cloud. Which AWS service should they use?
Which of the following AWS services can be used to orchestrate multiple AWS services into serverless workflows?
Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, which of the following is the customer's responsibility for an S3 bucket?
possible_answers: Protecting the physical infrastructure of S3
Configuring bucket permissions and access policies
correct_answers: Configuring bucket permissions and access policies

questions.question_text: Which AWS service helps you automatically scale your database storage capacity based on usage?
possible_answers: Amazon RDS with Storage Auto Scaling
correct_answers: Amazon RDS with Storage Auto Scaling

questions.question_text: A company wants to migrate its on-premises applications to AWS with minimal modifications. Which service allows them to run containerized applications on AWS without managing the control plane?
Which of the following are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF) perspectives? (Select TWO.)
Which AWS service provides a managed, scalable, and secure file storage for Windows-based applications?
possible_answers: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server
correct_answers: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server

questions.question_text: A company wants to analyze its AWS cost and usage data with advanced filtering and grouping. Which tool should they use?
Which of the following is true about AWS Edge Locations?
possible_answers: They are used primarily for caching content with CloudFront
Each AWS Region has exactly one edge location
Edge locations are only used for DNS resolution
Data stored at edge locations is automatically backed up to multiple Regions
correct_answers: They are used primarily for caching content with CloudFront

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, serverless data warehouse that automatically scales and charges only for queries run?
A company needs to securely store secrets such as database passwords and API keys. Which AWS service is designed for this?
Which of the following are benefits of using AWS Direct Connect? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: More consistent network performance than internet-based connections
correct_answers: More consistent network performance than internet-based connections

questions.question_text: Which AWS service is used to create and manage encryption keys for data at rest and in transit?
A company wants to run a high-performance computing (HPC) workload that requires low-latency network performance between EC2 instances. Which instance placement option should they choose?
Which of the following AWS services provides a highly available, durable, and scalable object storage with 99.999999999% (11 9's) durability?
Which AWS support plan provides access to the AWS Support API for programmatic case management and all Trusted Advisor checks?
A company wants to perform ad-hoc SQL queries directly on data stored in S3 without loading it into a database. Which service should they use?
Which of the following are design principles of the Reliability pillar in the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Select TWO.)
Which AWS service provides a fully managed, real-time streaming data platform that can capture, process, and analyze data streams?
A company needs to transfer data from an on-premises file server to S3 on a scheduled basis. Which service is optimized for this?
Which of the following is true about AWS Budgets?
possible_answers: It can send alerts when actual or forecasted cost exceeds a threshold
It automatically terminates resources when budget is exceeded
It requires a paid support plan
It can only track costs, not usage
correct_answers: It can send alerts when actual or forecasted cost exceeds a threshold

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a managed, distributed, and highly available message broker for Apache ActiveMQ and RabbitMQ?
A company wants to ensure that its S3 buckets are not publicly accessible. Which AWS service can continuously monitor and enforce compliance with this rule?
Which of the following are characteristics of Convertible Reserved Instances? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Allows changing instance family, OS, tenancy, and payment option
Provides a higher discount than Standard Reserved Instances
Cannot be exchanged for a different RI
Can be exchanged for a different RI of equal or greater value
correct_answers: Allows changing instance family, OS, tenancy, and payment option
Can be exchanged for a different RI of equal or greater value

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, scalable, and highly available key-value store for session data, leaderboards, and real-time analytics?
A company wants to provision a logically isolated section of the AWS Cloud where they can launch resources in a virtual network they define. Which service should they use?
Which of the following are benefits of using AWS Organizations? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Centralized management of multiple AWS accounts
correct_answers: Centralized management of multiple AWS accounts

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, cost-effective, and scalable service to move large amounts of data into and out of AWS using appliances?
Under the Shared Responsibility Model, who is responsible for patch management of the guest operating system on an EC2 instance?

A company wants to create a disaster recovery plan by copying snapshots of EBS volumes to another AWS Region. Which service automates this?
Which of the following are true about AWS Free Tier? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Includes 750 hours per month of EC2 t2.micro for 12 months
Includes 5 GB of S3 Standard storage permanently
Requires a paid support plan to access
Is available only for the first month
correct_answers: Includes 750 hours per month of EC2 t2.micro for 12 months
Includes 5 GB of S3 Standard storage permanently

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a scalable, cloud-native relational database that supports both MySQL and PostgreSQL, and offers up to 5x faster performance than standard MySQL?
A company wants to collect, process, and analyze real-time video and data streams from millions of devices. Which AWS service is designed for this?
Which of the following is a key benefit of AWS CloudFormation?

Which of the following are use cases for Amazon EBS Snapshots? (Select TWO.)
possible_answers: Creating a backup before making changes to an instance
correct_answers: Creating a backup before making changes to an instance

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, serverless data integration service that helps discover, prepare, and combine data for analytics?
A company wants to reduce its EC2 costs for a batch processing job that can be interrupted. Which purchasing option is most cost-effective?
Which of the following is true about AWS Shield Advanced?
possible_answers: It provides enhanced DDoS protection and access to the DDoS Response Team
It is free for all AWS customers
It only protects against application-layer attacks
It requires an Enterprise support plan
correct_answers: It provides enhanced DDoS protection and access to the DDoS Response Team

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly available, and scalable in-memory data store compatible with Redis?

Which of the following is true about the AWS Shared Responsibility Model for Lambda?
possible_answers: AWS is responsible for securing the Lambda execution environment
Customer is responsible for patching the runtime
AWS is responsible for securing customer code
Customer is responsible for scaling Lambda functions
correct_answers: AWS is responsible for securing the Lambda execution environment

Which AWS service provides a simple way to backup data across AWS services and on-premises, and supports cross-Region backups?
Which of the following is true about Spot Instances?
possible_answers: They can be terminated by AWS with a 2-minute notice
They are ideal for steady-state production workloads
They cannot be used with Auto Scaling
They offer a fixed discount of 50% off On-Demand
correct_answers: They can be terminated by AWS with a 2-minute notice

questions.question_text: Which AWS service provides a fully managed, highly available, and secure business email service?

It only works for EC2 and S3

correct_answers: It provides estimated costs for AWS services based on usage

possible_answers: They provide a physical server dedicated to a single customer
They are the cheapest EC2 pricing option

correct_answers: They provide a physical server dedicated to a single customer

possible_answers: It provides the most detailed cost and usage data
It is available only to Enterprise support customers
It does not include S3 storage costs
correct_answers: It provides the most detailed cost and usage data

possible_answers: It provides best practice recommendations in five categories
It is only available to Business and Enterprise support plans
It cannot be used for security checks
correct_answers: It provides best practice recommendations in five categories

possible_answers: Can be attached to multiple EC2 instances simultaneously
Available in SSD and HDD types
Global storage accessible from any Region
correct_answers: Available in SSD and HDD types

possible_answers: They offer lower prices than On-Demand in exchange for a commitment
They are only available for EC2

correct_answers: They offer lower prices than On-Demand in exchange for a commitment

possible_answers: Reduces cost by matching capacity to demand

possible_answers: It protects web applications from common web exploits
It provides DDoS protection at the network layer
It is a firewall for EC2 instances
correct_answers: It protects web applications from common web exploits

possible_answers: It allows customers to buy and sell third-party software that runs on AWS
It is a service for managing AWS costs

correct_answers: It allows customers to buy and sell third-party software that runs on AWS

It manages encryption keys for S3
